The '''T-28 repeating sniper rifle''' was a long-barreled [[Blaster rifle/Legends|Blaster rifle]] produced by [[BlasTech Industries/Legends|BlasTech]]. It was used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], and issued to [[stormtrooper sniper]]s, such as [[Taxtro Grave]].

==Appearances==
*[[Allegiance (novel)|''Allegiance'']] {{Ab|Allegiance (audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
*''[[Choices of One]]''
